case_title: JOHNSON, ROBERT L. VS CUSTOM ENGINE SHOP, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $275.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, ROBERT L. AS TO DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE SHOP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBPENA DUCES TECUM FROM KEEPER OF THE RECORDS FILED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE SHOP, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, ROBERT L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE SHOP, INC. $275.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $315.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SUPEBA DUCES TECUM AS TO MR C SERVETTI PRESIDENT POS FILED.

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAY-01-1997, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM MAY-01-1997 TO MAY-22-1997 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C AS TO THIRD PARTY C. SERVETTI, PRESIDENT   CUSTOMS ENGINES SHOP INC.

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE SHOP, INC.

WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT RETURNED BY SHERIFF AS TO THIRD PARTY C. SERVETTI, PRESIDENT   CUSTOMS ENGINES SHOP INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-14-1997 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUL-14-1997, DISCHARGED AS TO THIRD PARTY C. SERVETTI, PRESIDENT   CUSTOMS ENGINES SHOP INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE SHOP, INC.
